title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: Healing, Mental Purification and the Mind World
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: Illness is disharmony, either physical disharmony or mental disharmony; the one acts upon the other. What causes disharmony? The lack of tone and rhythm. How can it be interpreted in physical terminology? Prana, or life, or energy is the tone. Circulation, regularity is the rhythm; regularity in the
